title: EC LAB Charging Progress
html_prompt: Create a single-file HTML/CSS/JS preview with no external assets, no CDN, and no frameworks. Recreate a centered dark rounded-square EC LAB charging/progress card on a pale minimal background, with soft 3D shadows, dotted texture, subtle grain, numbered 0/50/100 scale, animated glowing capsule progress bar, linked ambient glow, and a breathing status dot. Use HTML/CSS/SVG/gradients/blur/shadow/text only. Preserve the compact square composition, dark graphite surface, red-to-green charging color behavior, soft depth, and minimal EC LAB / ec 的实验室 identity with AI Workflow, Design, Prompt, Code, Inspiration tone. Use the EC font sets and EC radius tokens only.

css.--blur: radial-gradient ambient glow, backdrop-like soft glow effects
css.--grain: inline SVG fractalNoise overlay at 0.02 opacity plus radial dot grid
css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
